page: Microsoft Azure E32s_v6 is an Esv6-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor with an x86_64 architecture, providing 32 virtual CPUs across 16 physical cores with 2 threads per core. The processor operates at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz and includes 260 MB of L3 cache. This instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include any local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmarks indicate strong performance in specific computational areas. The server achieves top 25% results in Geekbench single-core, image processing, and text processing tests, as well as single-threaded gzip compression and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Passmark CPU physics testing also ranks in the top 25%. However, the Passmark memory score falls into the bottom 25%, and large-block memory bandwidth benchmarks sit in the middle 50%. For language model workloads, the instance demonstrates top 10% text generation speeds for small 135M models and top 25% prompt processing speeds for medium 7B models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E32s_v6 offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local SSD storage. Given its 256.0 GB memory capacity and strong single-threaded compression and text processing capabilities, this server is suited for database operations, memory-cached web serving, and medium-scale language model inference.
description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v6 is an Esv6-family virtual machine powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor. Operating at 4.2 GHz, this x86_64 architecture server provides 32 vCPUs across 16 physical cores and features 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmark data shows strong performance in single-threaded gzip compression, Geekbench single-core, and image processing, alongside top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. Conversely, its Passmark memory score is positioned in the bottom 25%. With its high memory density and average to strong CPU performance, the E32s_v6 is suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, and text processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v6 is an Esv6-family virtual machine featuring 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor, optimized for memory-intensive databases and text processing.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v6 is an Esv6 virtual machine with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, designed for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for data-intensive workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB per vCPU allocation
Strong performance in single-threaded compression and text processing benchmarks
